title: ranunculus japonicus var. propinquus
intro: Ranunculus japonicus var. propinquus, also known as creeping buttercup, is a perennial plant that belongs to the buttercup family and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus japonicus var. propinquus include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, salves, and ointments, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
